prompts: The chibi character looks up sharply at the spoon, eyes widening dramatically. Camera executes a rapid slow push-in toward the suspended golden oil drop. The drop trembles slightly, catching light. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The chibi character slowly rotates the magnifying glass, the glowing polyphenol molecule at center pulses rhythmically outward in rings of soft light. Camera gently orbits clockwise around the character. Warm amber glow intensifies and fades in a steady heartbeat rhythm. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The character shifts slightly, slumping deeper with a slow exhale, tiny storm clouds above it swirling lazily. Camera pulls back slowly to reveal the full grey scene. The mitochondria embers inside the chest flicker and dim further. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The character straightens up with a slow, confident nod, the mitochondria furnaces inside its chest flaring brightly one by one. The golden shields pulse outward rhythmically. Camera slowly tilts upward from chest to face as the character smiles. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The chibi character slowly pours the oil in a steady stream, golden polyphenol sparkles rising gently and drifting upward off-screen. Camera pushes in steadily toward the bowl. Warm morning light shifts slightly brighter across the scene. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The chibi character waves warmly toward the camera with a gentle, rhythmic arm motion. Camera slowly zooms out to reveal the full amphitheater plaza and tiny crowd below. The olive oil bottle glows steadily, amber light pulsing softly like a heartbeat. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.
